BlogPosts.Title: Getting Started with C# 12
BlogPosts.Excerpt: Learn the new features in C# 12 and how to use them effectively in your projects.
BlogPosts.Content: C# 12 introduces several exciting features including primary constructors, collection expressions, and more. In this comprehensive guide, we'll explore each feature with practical examples and best practices.

BlogPosts.Title: Mastering Entity Framework Core
BlogPosts.Excerpt: Deep dive into EF Core with advanced techniques and performance optimization.
BlogPosts.Content: Entity Framework Core is a powerful ORM for .NET applications. This article covers advanced topics like complex relationships, query optimization, and performance tuning.

BlogPosts.Title: Clean Architecture in .NET 8
BlogPosts.Excerpt: Implement Clean Architecture principles in your ASP.NET Core applications.
BlogPosts.Content: Clean Architecture promotes separation of concerns and maintainability. This guide shows you how to structure your .NET 8 applications using Clean Architecture with real-world examples.

BlogPosts.Title: React Hooks Deep Dive
BlogPosts.Excerpt: Master React Hooks with practical examples and advanced patterns.
BlogPosts.Content: React Hooks revolutionized how we write React components. This comprehensive guide covers useState, useEffect, useContext, useReducer, and custom hooks.

BlogPosts.Title: Python for Data Science
BlogPosts.Excerpt: Learn data analysis and visualization using Python and popular libraries.
BlogPosts.Content: Python has become the go-to language for data science. This tutorial introduces you to essential libraries including Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and Seaborn.

BlogPosts.Title: Docker Containerization Guide
BlogPosts.Excerpt: Learn how to containerize your applications using Docker.
BlogPosts.Content: Docker has transformed how we deploy applications. This guide covers Docker fundamentals including images, containers, Dockerfiles, and Docker Compose.

BlogPosts.Title: Draft: Advanced C# Techniques
BlogPosts.Excerpt: Explore advanced C# programming techniques and patterns.
BlogPosts.Content: This is a draft post about advanced C# techniques including async/await patterns, memory management, and source generators.
